# Template: Developer Implementation Notes

**Agent:** developer
**Creates:** `developer.md`
**Location:** `.github/work/current/<feature-name>/developer.md`

---

```markdown
# Developer Implementation Notes

## Implementation Approach

Brief description of the implementation strategy and key decisions.

## Tasks

- [ ] <task from plan>
- [ ] <task from plan>
- [ ] <task from plan>

## Files Modified

| File | Changes |
|------|---------|
| `<file-path>` | <description of changes> |

## Technical Decisions

### <Decision Title>

**Context:** <why this decision was needed>
**Decision:** <what was decided>
**Rationale:** <why this approach was chosen>

## Blockers

- [ ] <blocker description> - Status: <investigating/resolved>

## Deviations from Plan

| Planned | Actual | Reason |
|---------|--------|--------|
| <original approach> | <new approach> | <justification> |

## Testing Notes

- <test scenario and result>
- <test scenario and result>

## Completion Status

- [ ] All tasks implemented
- [ ] Tests written and passing
- [ ] ESLint passes
- [ ] Build successful
- [ ] Ready for review

## Notes

<additional observations, learnings, or context for reviewers>
```
